policy: One skill, one failure mode, one reviewed candidate at a time. SkillOpt output is advisory until manually accepted.

candidates.failure_mode: webpage extraction accuracy, login/cookie pages, and markdown fidelity
candidates.acceptance_gate: Improves extraction QA without adding hidden browser/API requirements.

candidates.failure_mode: A-share data task routing and concise finance answer quality
candidates.acceptance_gate: Improves benchmark finance judgments while preserving source/API caveats.

candidates.failure_mode: skill authoring precision, trigger clarity, and review discipline
candidates.acceptance_gate: Improves skill quality rubric results without bloating the trigger description.

candidates.failure_mode: Chinese article structure, headings, summaries, and style consistency
candidates.acceptance_gate: Improves rubric score while preserving Baoyu suite workflow compatibility.

candidates.failure_mode: frontend implementation plan quality and visual/spec compliance
candidates.acceptance_gate: Improves compliance rubric without pulling in large binary assets or broadening scope.
